description_long: This is a single-story, modern-style house set on a large green plot, featuring a long, rectangular footprint with a prominent driveway and fenced perimeter. The structure has a flat, slightly sloped roof and a combination of open and enclosed spaces, including a covered carport or patio area. The exterior walls are primarily light-colored, with large window openings and a mix of solid and transparent surfaces. The house includes a main entryway sheltered by an overhang, and the layout suggests an open-plan living area with adjacent outdoor spaces. The fencing is linear and extends from the house, demarcating the property boundary. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines, open sightlines, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a long driveway, set within a fenced green yard. The design features open and enclosed spaces, a covered entry, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, driveway, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered carport or patio area and the flat roof profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, window placements, and the length of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entry or patio area and the continuation of the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, steps, and a covered porch area, minimalistic and open.
